languages.original_text: "Registering: what exactly are the causes of the doom the xenos prophesises? Geothermal? Economic? What is the likelihood of preventing or harnessing the energy of the catastrophe for the glory of the Omnissiah?"

languages.text: "Фиксирую: какие именно причины гибели пророчит ксенос? Геотермальные? Экономические? Какова вероятность предотвращения или использования энергии катастрофы во благо Омниссии?"

"Registering: what exactly are the causes of the doom the xenos prophesises? Geothermal? Economic? What is the likelihood of preventing or harnessing the energy of the catastrophe for the glory of the Omnissiah?"
languages.original_text: "Фиксирую: какие именно причины гибели пророчит ксенос? Геотермальные? Экономические? Какова вероятность предотвращения или использования энергии катастрофы во благо Омниссии?"

traits.locale_text: "Registering: what exactly are the causes of the doom the xenos prophesises? Geothermal? Economic? What is the likelihood of preventing or harnessing the energy of the catastrophe for the glory of the Omnissiah?"

"Registering: what exactly are the causes of the doom the xenos prophesises? Geothermal? Economic? What is the likelihood of preventing or harnessing the energy of the catastrophe for the glory of the Omnissiah?"

"Registering: what exactly are the causes of the doom the xenos prophesises? Geothermal? Economic? What is the likelihood of preventing or harnessing the energy of the catastrophe for the glory of the Omnissiah?"

languages.text: 「登録中：異星人の予言する滅亡の正確な原因は何か？地熱？経済？その災厄のエネルギーを阻止したり、オムニシアの栄光のために利用したりする可能性はどれくらいあるのか？」
languages.original_text: "Registering: what exactly are the causes of the doom the xenos prophesises? Geothermal? Economic? What is the likelihood of preventing or harnessing the energy of the catastrophe for the glory of the Omnissiah?"

traits.locale_text: 「登録中：異星人の予言する滅亡の正確な原因は何か？地熱？経済？その災厄のエネルギーを阻止したり、オムニシアの栄光のために利用したりする可能性はどれくらいあるのか？」

languages.text: « Interrogation : quelle est la nature exacte de ce qui causera la perte de ce monde comme prédit par la xénos ? Géothermique ? Économique ? Quelle est la probabilité d'empêcher cette catastrophe ou d'exploiter son énergie pour la gloire de l'Omnimessie ? »
languages.original_text: "Registering: what exactly are the causes of the doom the xenos prophesises? Geothermal? Economic? What is the likelihood of preventing or harnessing the energy of the catastrophe for the glory of the Omnissiah?"

traits.locale_text: « Interrogation : quelle est la nature exacte de ce qui causera la perte de ce monde comme prédit par la xénos ? Géothermique ? Économique ? Quelle est la probabilité d'empêcher cette catastrophe ou d'exploiter son énergie pour la gloire de l'Omnimessie ? »

languages.text: "Registriere: Welcher Art sind den Xenos-Prophezeiungen zufolge die Ursachen des Untergangs? Geothermisch? Ökonomisch? Wie hoch ist die Wahrscheinlichkeit, die Energie der Katastrophe einzudämmen oder für den Ruhm des Omnissiah zu nutzen?"
languages.original_text: "Registering: what exactly are the causes of the doom the xenos prophesises? Geothermal? Economic? What is the likelihood of preventing or harnessing the energy of the catastrophe for the glory of the Omnissiah?"

traits.locale_text: "Registriere: Welcher Art sind den Xenos-Prophezeiungen zufolge die Ursachen des Untergangs? Geothermisch? Ökonomisch? Wie hoch ist die Wahrscheinlichkeit, die Energie der Katastrophe einzudämmen oder für den Ruhm des Omnissiah zu nutzen?"

languages.text: "Şunlar kaydedilmekte: Zeno kehaneti olan kıyametin nedenleri tam olarak nedir? Jeotermal mi? Ekonomik mi? Felaketi önleme veya enerjisini Hermesih'in şanı için kullanma olasılığı nedir?"
languages.original_text: "Registering: what exactly are the causes of the doom the xenos prophesises? Geothermal? Economic? What is the likelihood of preventing or harnessing the energy of the catastrophe for the glory of the Omnissiah?"

traits.locale_text: "Şunlar kaydedilmekte: Zeno kehaneti olan kıyametin nedenleri tam olarak nedir? Jeotermal mi? Ekonomik mi? Felaketi önleme veya enerjisini Hermesih'in şanı için kullanma olasılığı nedir?"

languages.text: «Registrando: ¿cuáles son las causas exactas del cataclismo augurado por la xenos? ¿Geotérmicas? ¿Económicas? ¿Qué probabilidades habría de evitar o controlar la energía generada por la catástrofe para mayor gloria del Omnissiah?».
languages.original_text: "Registering: what exactly are the causes of the doom the xenos prophesises? Geothermal? Economic? What is the likelihood of preventing or harnessing the energy of the catastrophe for the glory of the Omnissiah?"

traits.locale_text: «Registrando: ¿cuáles son las causas exactas del cataclismo augurado por la xenos? ¿Geotérmicas? ¿Económicas? ¿Qué probabilidades habría de evitar o controlar la energía generada por la catástrofe para mayor gloria del Omnissiah?».

languages.text: “记录：该异形预言了毁灭，这毁灭的确切成因究竟是什么？地热？还是经济？为了万机之神的荣耀，我们预防或利用此次灾害能量之可能性有多大？”
languages.original_text: "Registering: what exactly are the causes of the doom the xenos prophesises? Geothermal? Economic? What is the likelihood of preventing or harnessing the energy of the catastrophe for the glory of the Omnissiah?"

traits.locale_text: “记录：该异形预言了毁灭，这毁灭的确切成因究竟是什么？地热？还是经济？为了万机之神的荣耀，我们预防或利用此次灾害能量之可能性有多大？”
